lines.speaker: Wizard Grayzag
lines.text: So you think finding those beads makes you clever, do you?

lines.speaker: Wizard Grayzag
lines.text: Well you'd better just watch your back, because when you least expect it I'll be there. You shouldn't go sticking your nose into other people's affairs, meddler.

lines.speaker: Wizard Grayzag
lines.text: You're a fool, [player name]. Do you really think you'll find four imps out of thousands? Good luck. Ha!

lines.speaker: Wizard Grayzag
lines.text: Not now, I'm trying to concentrate on a very difficult spell!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You were nicer to me when you had that little gnome wandering around here before.

lines.speaker: Wizard Grayzag
lines.text: Well he's not bothering me anymore, is he? And you don't need to bother me either!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You seemed like a completely different person when you were complimenting Gary on his ritual that opened the Realm of Memories.

lines.speaker: Wizard Grayzag
lines.text: My son's a smart kid who's becoming a great wizard, while you're a do-gooder who fetches & carries stuff for smarter people. I know which of you two earned my respect.
